caption: A man wearing a distinctive, tall, gray wig and eyeglasses sits in a recording studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with brown suspenders and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits behind a black professional microphone. To his left, a logo reads "GOSS TALK JOY" above the word "PODCAST". To his right, a similar logo appears, though partially obscured. The background is a studio wall decorated with framed photographs, clothing on mannequins, and a yellow sign that says "LEE". The man maintains a steady, neutral facial expression while looking slightly off-camera. There is minimal movement across the sequence, with only subtle shifts in his posture and head position, as the camera remains fixed in a medium shot.
